project.title: Enigma-Credential-Tracker
project.scenario: Diploma/credential verification — issuers anchor credentials an employer verifies in seconds; revocable.

tasks.title: Plan Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Institution Registration slice.

tasks.title: Design Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Specify contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol — functions (registerInstitution, deregisterInstitution, transferRegistrar), events, errors, storage layout.

tasks.title: Code Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Implement registerInstitution, deregisterInstitution, transferRegistrar in contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol (clear the TODO(member1) markers).

tasks.title: Compile
tasks.desc: `forge build` is green including the Institution Registration slice.

tasks.title: Revise after review
tasks.desc: Address PR review feedback; refactor contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol and tests.

tasks.title: Deploy Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Deploy via script/Deploy.s.sol to Anvil (then Sepolia); record addresses in config.js.

tasks.title: Test Institution Registration
tasks.desc: `forge test --match-contract IssuerRegistryTest` passes; add edge-case + event tests.

tasks.title: Document Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Write docs/issuer-module.md and fill your README contribution row.

tasks.title: Present Institution Registration
tasks.desc: Record a demo video + slide deck and link them under Deliverables.
